message.content:
This is a dashboard page (likely an admin or management dashboard). It shows **data** (not empty):  

- The “Recent Orders” section displays the last 10 orders across all shops, with details like order IDs, status (“DELIVERED”), amounts, and dates.  
- The “Top Products” section is empty (shows “No product data yet”).  
- The “Active Automation Rules” section lists three automation rules (Credit Auto-Lock, Group Buy Threshold, Cash Reconciliation) with descriptions.
